description:
CrystalMark Retro is a comprehensive benchmarking software.

This software supports 32-bit (x86), 64-bit (x64/ARM64), many-core, and multilingual (48+ languages) systems,
and can measure CPU, Disk, 2D graphics (GDI), and 3D graphics (OpenGL) performance with a single
click. Benchmark results can be registered in CrystalMarkDB for centralized management of past
results (account required: free of charge) and comparison with data registered by users around
the world.
Benchmark results are compatible with 2.0.0.
- Added “CrystalMark Inc.” as copyright holder
- Changed code signature to “CrystalMark Inc.”
- Updated: DiskSpd 2.2
- Added: Shizuku Edition (No Voice)
